Usage: postman sdk [options] [command]

Generate and manage your SDKs directly from the command line.

Options:
  -h, --help                           display help for command

Commands:
  init [options]                       Create or update .postman/config.json
                                       with an SDK configuration stub.
  generate|build [options] <idOrPath>  Generate a new SDK from a Postman
                                       collection or specification.
  track [options]                      Enable change tracking for a generated
                                       SDK. Adds file hashes to .manifest.json
                                       so that the next `sdk generate` can
                                       detect your edits and preserve them via
                                       3-way merge.
  list|ls [options] <id>               List SDK builds for a collection,
                                       extensible collection, or specification.
  fetch|get [options] <buildId>        Download SDKs from a build by its ID.
  connect [options] <provider> <id>    Connect a collection or specification to
                                       a Git repository for automated SDK PRs
  help [command]                       display help for command
